objective: Motivated and detail-oriented Frontend Developer with hands-on experience in React.js, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Certified in MERN Stack Development, with a strong foundation in building responsive, user-friendly web interfaces. Eager to contribute to a dynamic team and grow through real-world, impactful projects.

certifications.title: MERN Stack Developer — Full Course Certification
certifications.description: Comprehensive training in MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js. Worked on real-time projects covering REST APIs, component-based UI development, and state management. Gained practical experience in Git version control and deployment workflows.

projects.title: Inventory Management System
projects.description: Designed and developed a responsive web-based inventory dashboard to track stock, products, and category-wise data. Implemented dynamic filtering, search functionality, and real-time quantity updates using React state management. Built a clean, modular component architecture following best practices for scalability and code reuse. Incorporated visual data indicators (low stock alerts, status badges) for enhanced operational visibility.

projects.title: Job Portal — Frontend UI
projects.description: Developed a fully responsive Job Portal frontend showcasing multi-page UI design including home, job listings, job detail, and application pages. Implemented dynamic job card components with filters for role, location, and experience using React hooks. Focused on pixel-perfect, mobile-first design with smooth navigation using React Router. Demonstrated strong UI/UX sensibility through consistent layout, typography hierarchy, and accessible color contrasts.

education.institution: St. Vincent Pallotti College of Engineering & Technology, Nagpur
